DistributedApplicationExtensions.cs.reason: Extension methods on DistributedApplication (Aspire hosting) — requires real Aspire host, cannot be mocked

DistributedApplicationTestingBuilderExte.reason: Extension methods on IDistributedApplicationTestingBuilder — requires Aspire test builder, cannot be mocked

EncinaTestContext.cs.reason: POCO with constructor validation, property accessors, and Clear methods — fully testable with fakes

EncinaTestSupportOptions.cs.reason: Configuration POCO with default values — only needs unit tests for defaults verification

FailureSimulationExtensions.cs.reason: Extension methods on DistributedApplication for failure simulation — requires real Aspire host
